about_gameP1: Ragnarok: The New World is the first open-world MMORPG in the Ragnarok Online franchise. Explore the seamless continent of Midgard with 8 switchable classes, safe refining up to +15, offline auto-hunting, and MVP mount taming. Free to play on PC (Steam), Android, and iOS with cross-platform support and 120 FPS on Steam.
about_source_1: In-game testing and community data collection
about_source_2: Official Ragnarok: The New World Discord community reports
about_source_3: Steam page updates and patch notes from Gravity Game Vision
about_source_4: Community-submitted tier lists and class build discussions
about_wikiP1: Ragnarok: The New World Wiki is a community-driven resource dedicated to helping players of Ragnarok: The New World — the first open-world MMORPG in the Ragnarok series by Gravity Game Vision and GRAVITY Co., Ltd. Our goal is to provide accurate, up-to-date information on classes, builds, codes, MVP hunting, safe refining, and Zeny farming.
about_wikiP2: This wiki is not affiliated with or endorsed by Gravity Game Vision or GRAVITY Co., Ltd. All game assets, names, and trademarks are the property of their respective owners.
about_wikiTitle: What is Ragnarok: The New World Wiki?
codes_faq_1: How often are new codes released?
codes_faq_1_answer: New codes are typically released during milestones, patch updates, and community events. Follow the official Discord and social media for the fastest notifications.
codes_faq_2: Do codes work on all platforms?
codes_faq_2_answer: Most codes work across PC (Steam), Android, and iOS. Some regional codes may be platform-specific — check the code details before redeeming.
codes_faq_3_answer: No, expired codes cannot be redeemed. Once a code passes its expiration date, it is permanently disabled. Redeem codes as soon as you find them to avoid missing out.
codes_faq_4_answer: At the login screen, tap the Poring icon in the upper-left corner, enter your server, character name, and the code, complete the captcha, and tap Redeem.
codes_intro: Redeem codes in Ragnarok: The New World provide free Zeny, Kafra Blind Boxes, Adventure Coins, hair dyes, and cosmetic items. New codes are released through Discord, social media, and community events. Redeem quickly — some codes expire within days.
codes_noActiveDesc: New codes are usually released during game updates and milestones. Check back after patches!
codes_note: Codes are case-sensitive and may require a minimum level. If a code doesn't work, the game may have updated — try again after maintenance!
codes_step_1: Open Ragnarok: The New World and go to the login screen
codes_step_2: Tap the Poring icon in the upper-left corner
codes_step_3: Enter your server, character name, and the code
codes_step_5: Tap Redeem and check your inventory for rewards!
content_fallbackNotice: This article is currently shown in English.
currency_zeny_desc: Primary in-game currency for trading and purchases
currency_adventureCoin_desc: Special currency from events and codes
currency_kafraBlindBox_desc: Random reward boxes from events and codes
faq_bestClass: What is the best class in Ragnarok: The New World?
faq_bestClass_answer: Gunslinger and Mage are S-tier for early game — Gunslinger for MVP burst and mobility, Mage for fastest leveling with AoE. For endgame GvG, Swordsman/Knight is irreplaceable. Check our Tier List for detailed rankings.
faq_bestStarterClass: What is the best starter class for F2P?
faq_bestStarterClass_answer: Mage or Gunslinger are the best F2P starters. Mage levels fastest with Fire Wall kiting, while Gunslinger dominates early MVPs. With Job Freedom, you can switch anytime for free, so don't worry about your first pick.
faq_howToCodes_answer: At the login screen, tap the Poring icon (upper-left), enter your server, character name, and code, complete the captcha, and tap Redeem. Codes are case-sensitive.
faq_jobFreedom_answer: Job Freedom lets you switch between all 8 classes on a single character — no alt accounts needed. Skill resets are free. Each class has independent job levels, so you can explore multiple playstyles without penalty.
faq_safeRefine_answer: Ragnarok: The New World is the first RO game where equipment cannot break on refinement failure up to +15. Failed refines reduce the level by 1 instead of destroying the item, making endgame gearing much less stressful.
faq_p2w: Is Ragnarok: The New World pay-to-win?
faq_p2w_answer: The game is free to play with optional in-app purchases. Key progression like leveling, MVPs, and refining can all be done F2P. Convenience items exist but don't gate core content. The community remains divided on specific gacha elements.
faq_mvpMounts: Can I tame MVPs as mounts?
faq_mvpMounts_answer: Yes! Defeated MVPs can be tamed as rideable mounts — a first for the RO franchise. Each MVP type gives a unique mount. This is one of the game's signature features.
faq_flyingMounts_answer: Yes, Ragnarok: The New World is the first RO game to feature flying vehicles. Unlock wings through quests and soar across the entire Midgard continent. Flying mounts provide seamless open-world traversal.
faq_offlineFarming_answer: Yes, the offline auto-hunting system continues earning resources while you're away. Your character will automatically farm at designated locations, accumulating Zeny, items, and experience passively.
faq_pvp_answer: Yes — 1v1, 3v3, and 5v5 arena modes with ranked and casual queues. There's also War of Emperium (GvG) where guilds siege castles. Swordsman/Knight and Thief/Assassin dominate different PvP formats.
faq_crossplay_answer: Yes, Ragnarok: The New World supports cross-platform play between PC (Steam), Android, and iOS. Progress carries over between platforms. Steam version supports 120 FPS.
faq_zenyFarming: How do I farm Zeny efficiently?
faq_zenyFarming_answer: Archer ADL build for safe open-field farming, Mage Fire Wall kiting for high-density maps, or Merchant stall trading in Prontera. F2P players can earn 1.5M+ Zeny daily with optimized routines. See our Zeny Farming Guide.
faq_bestDpsBuild: What is the best DPS build?
faq_bestDpsBuild_answer: Gunslinger Dex/Agi/Vit for ranged burst, Mage Int/Dex for AoE leveling, or Thief Luk/Agi/Str for 193 ASPD crit builds. Each excels in different content — check our Class Builds page for details.
faq_druidForms_answer: Druid has three shapeshifting forms: Werewolf (melee Str/Vit), Bird-Man (ranged Dex/Agi), and Human Arcanist (magic Int). You can switch forms freely, making Druid the most versatile class.
faq_timeCorridor_answer: Time Corridor is the daily dungeon system that resets every day. Complete it for refinement materials, cards, and equipment. Normal mode for beginners, Hard mode for parties with better drops.

feature_safeRefine_desc: First RO game where equipment never breaks on refine failure. Gear to +15 worry-free.

feature_offline_desc: Your character continues farming resources while you're away from the game.
feature_openWorld_desc: No loading screens between zones. Real-time lighting and day-night cycles across Midgard.
feature_gvG_desc: Guild vs Guild castle siege warfare. Defend or capture castles for exclusive rewards.

home_about_p1: Ragnarok: The New World is the first open-world MMORPG in the Ragnarok Online franchise, officially licensed by Gravity and developed by Gravity Game Vision. It features a seamless Midgard continent with no loading screens, 8 classes switchable on a single character, and the debut of the shapeshifting Druid class.
home_about_p2: The game introduces grindless innovations: free stat and skill resets, safe weapon refining up to +15 with no break on failure, offline auto-hunting for passive resource gain, and flying mounts for traversing the vast open world. Cross-platform play between PC and mobile with 120 FPS support on Steam.
home_about_title: What is Ragnarok: The New World?

privacyPolicy_changes_p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date. Your continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacyPolicy_children_p1: Ragnarok: The New World is a fantasy MMORPG that may attract a wide age range. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we become aware that we have inadvertently collected such information, we will take steps to delete it.
privacyPolicy_contact_p1: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, you can reach us through the Ragnarok: The New World Discord community server.
privacyPolicy_dataRights_contact: Contact us if you believe any data about you has been collected and you want it removed.
privacyPolicy_dataRights_cookies: Disable cookies in your browser settings. Note that this may affect site functionality.
privacyPolicy_dataRights_optOut: Opt out of Google Analytics tracking by installing the Google Analytics opt-out browser add-on.
privacyPolicy_dataRights_p1: Since we collect minimal data and no personal information, there is limited data to manage. However, you may:
privacyPolicy_howUse_analytics: Analytics: Understanding how visitors interact with our content so we can improve the wiki.
privacyPolicy_howUse_p1: The information we collect is used for:
privacyPolicy_howUse_performance: Performance: Monitoring site performance and fixing technical issues.
privacyPolicy_howUse_preferences: Preferences: Remembering your language and theme choices across sessions.
privacyPolicy_infoCollect_auto: Automatically collected data: When you visit our site, we may collect standard log information including your IP address, browser type, referring page, pages visited, and time spent on pages. This data is collected through Google Analytics.
privacyPolicy_infoCollect_cookies: Cookies: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies for analytics (Google Analytics) and to remember your language preference and theme settings.
privacyPolicy_infoCollect_noPersonal: We do NOT collect personal information such as names, email addresses, phone numbers, or payment details. We do NOT require user accounts or registrations.
privacyPolicy_infoCollect_p1: We collect minimal information to provide and improve our services:
privacyPolicy_intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Ragnarok: The New World Wiki ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and protects information when you visit our website at www.ragnarok-the-new-world.wiki.
privacyPolicy_security_p1: We implement reasonable security measures to protect any information we collect. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacyPolicy_thirdParty_discord: Discord: Our site links to the Ragnarok: The New World Discord server. Discord has its own privacy practices.
privacyPolicy_thirdParty_ga: Google Analytics: For website traffic analysis. Google collects data through cookies and may share aggregated data. See Google's Privacy Policy for details.
privacyPolicy_thirdParty_p1: We use the following third-party services:
privacyPolicy_thirdParty_steam: Steam: Our site links to the Steam platform. Steam has its own privacy practices that are beyond our control.

tierList_community_2: Class performance varies with builds, gear, and game content
tierList_community_3: Tier placements may shift with game updates and balance patches
tierList_community_4: Always check the official Discord for the latest meta discussion
tierList_intro: Our Ragnarok: The New World tier list ranks all 8 classes based on DPS output, farming efficiency, MVP performance, PvP viability, and F2P accessibility. Rankings are updated regularly based on community data, developer patches, and competitive play trends.
tierList_tierA_desc: Strong picks — excellent in the right build and content
tierList_tierB_desc: Niche picks — strong in specific roles, gear-dependent
tierList_tierS_desc: Dominant picks — build your party around these classes
class_gunslinger_desc: Ranged burst DPS with weapon swapping. The MVP king with high burst damage and mobility, ideal for players who want the strongest early game class.
class_gunslinger_strengths: Highest single-target burst damage in the game. Weapon swapping enables flexible damage types, and Dex/Agi/Vit build provides both offense and survivability.
class_gunslinger_build: Dex/Agi/Vit — maximize ranged damage with Dex, boost attack speed with Agi, and survive with Vit. Second job: none (standalone class).
class_gunslinger_tip1: Use weapon swapping to adapt damage types to different MVP weaknesses
class_gunslinger_tip2: Headshot during vulnerability windows for maximum burst on MVPs
class_gunslinger_tip3: Stack Dex for damage and Agi for ASPD — Vit comes from gear, not base stats
class_mage_desc: Fastest leveling class in the game. Fire Wall kiting and wide AoE make Mage the go-to for efficient farming and quick progression to Wizard.
class_mage_strengths: Unmatched leveling speed with Fire Wall kiting and wide AoE spells. Meteor Storm and Storm Gust dominate group content. Int/Dex build maximizes magical output.
class_mage_build: Int/Dex — maximize magic damage with Int and cast speed with Dex. Advance to Wizard for Meteor Storm and Storm Gust.
class_mage_tip1: Use Fire Wall to kite enemies — it's your best leveling tool
class_mage_tip2: Stock SP potions via Daily Routine — Mage burns through SP fast
class_mage_tip3: Meteor Storm for AoE, Storm Gust for crowd control — know when to use each
class_swordsman_desc: The irreplaceable GvG frontline tank. High effective HP with Bowling Bash cleave and crowd control. Advance to Knight for even more battlefield dominance.
class_swordsman_strengths: Highest effective HP in the game with natural tankiness. Bowling Bash provides excellent cleave damage in group fights. Str/Vit/Dex build makes Swordsmen the backbone of any GvG party.
class_swordsman_build: Str/Vit/Dex — maximize damage and HP with Str/Vit, and hit rate with Dex. Advance to Knight for Bowling Bash and GvG dominance.
class_swordsman_tip1: Position between enemies and your party to absorb damage and protect allies
class_swordsman_tip2: Bowling Bash combos are devastating in GvG — practice the timing
class_swordsman_tip3: Vit gear is your priority — survive long enough to land your combos
class_archer_desc: The safest solo farmer. ADL, Trapper, and Falconer sub-builds offer versatile ranged gameplay. Advance to Hunter for powerful trapping and falcon skills.
class_archer_strengths: Safest solo farming with ranged attacks. Multiple sub-builds (ADL, Trapper, Falconer) allow flexible gameplay. Dex/Agi build provides consistent damage and attack speed.
class_archer_build: Dex/Agi — maximize ranged damage with Dex and attack speed with Agi. Advance to Hunter for ADL/Trapper/Falconer specializations.
class_archer_tip1: ADL build is the safest for open-world farming — keep your distance
class_archer_tip2: Trapper excels in Time Corridor Hard — set traps at chokepoints
class_archer_tip3: Falconer is great for hands-off farming — let your falcon do the work
class_acolyte_desc: Every party needs a healer. Buff and support your allies with powerful holy magic. Advance to Priest for essential party skills like Magnificat and Kyrie.
class_acolyte_strengths: Every party in the game needs a Priest — you will never struggle to find a group. Magnificat, Kyrie, and Magnus Exorcismus make Priests essential for MVPs and GvG. Battle Priest is a viable solo build.
class_acolyte_build: Int/Vit — maximize healing power with Int and survivability with Vit. Advance to Priest for party-essential skills.
class_acolyte_tip1: Always keep Magnificat active for SP regeneration
class_acolyte_tip2: Kyrie Eleison before big hits — it absorbs damage before it lands
class_acolyte_tip3: Battle Priest is viable for solo — invest in Str and melee skills
class_druid_desc: The new shapeshifting class with three forms: Werewolf for melee, Bird-Man for ranged, and Human Arcanist for magic. The most versatile class in the game.
class_druid_strengths: Three forms in one class — Werewolf for melee sustain, Bird-Man for ranged kiting, Human Arcanist for elemental magic. Str/Vit, Dex/Agi, or Int builds depending on your active form.
class_druid_build: Werewolf: Str/Vit for melee brawl. Bird-Man: Dex/Agi for ranged kiting. Human: Int for elemental magic. All forms available on one character.
class_druid_tip1: Werewolf form dominates close-quarters PvP skirmishes
class_druid_tip2: Bird-Man form is the safest MVP kiting option
class_druid_tip3: Human Arcanist becomes stronger once Karnos skill line unlocks
class_thief_desc: PvP burst specialist with 193 ASPD crit scaling. Sonic Blow combos deal devastating damage, but Thief is gear-hungry and requires investment. Advance to Assassin Cross.
class_thief_strengths: Devastating PvP burst with Sonic Blow combos. 193 ASPD crit build has the highest damage ceiling in the game. Luk/Agi/Str build enables powerful critical hits.
class_thief_build: Luk/Agi/Str — stack critical rate with Luk, attack speed with Agi, and damage with Str. Advance to Assassin Cross for Sonic Blow.
class_thief_tip1: Sonic Blow combos are your bread and butter in PvP — master the timing
class_thief_tip2: 193 ASPD is the cap — every point of Agi counts toward it
class_thief_tip3: Thief is gear-hungry — prioritize weapons first, then crit cards
class_merchant_desc: The economy engine. Stall trading, weapon forging, and Cart Revolution AoE make Merchant the wealth-building class. Advance to Blacksmith for even more economic power.
class_merchant_strengths: Best Zeny-earning class in the game with stall trading and weapon forging. Cart Revolution provides AoE farming. Late-game Cart and Mech DPS are surprisingly strong. Str/Dex build.
class_merchant_build: Str/Dex — maximize physical damage with Str and hit rate with Dex. Advance to Blacksmith for Cart Revolution and weapon forging.
class_merchant_tip1: Open stalls in Prontera during peak hours for maximum trading
class_merchant_tip2: Forge weapons for profit — you can sell forged gear at premium prices
class_merchant_tip3: Don't gamble refines for income — stable trading beats RNG
tierList_criteria_combat_desc: DPS output, burst potential, and sustained damage in PvE and PvP content
tierList_criteria_versatility_desc: Ability to adapt to different content types and party compositions
tierList_criteria_survivability_desc: Effective HP, damage mitigation, and self-sustain capabilities
tierList_criteria_build_desc: Number of viable sub-builds and ease of gearing for F2P players
tierList_criteria_synergy_desc: How well the class performs in group content with other classes
tierList_faq_1: How often is the tier list updated?
tierList_faq_1_answer: We update our tier list after every major balance patch and at least once per month. Check the official Discord for the latest meta discussion.
tierList_faq_2: Should I only play S-tier classes?
tierList_faq_2_answer: No — B-tier classes like Thief and Merchant are strong in specific niches. With Job Freedom, you can switch classes freely, so play what you enjoy.
tierList_faq_3: Does gear matter more than class tier?
tierList_faq_3_answer: At endgame, gear and build quality matter as much as class selection. A well-geared B-tier class can outperform a poorly built S-tier class.
tierList_faq_4: Which class is best for solo play?
tierList_faq_4_answer: Mage and Archer are the best solo classes — Mage for fast leveling, Archer for safe farming. Both have strong F2P builds.
